## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start VibeMind with `...`
2. Say / click / do `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or log output.

## Environment

- **OS**: Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 24.04
- **Python**: 3.11.x
- **Node.js**: 18.x / 20.x
- **Execution Mode**: Sync (`FORCE_SYNC_MODE=true`) / Async (Redis)
- **Spaces in use**: Ideas / Coding / Desktop / other
